tEn: Bootstrap your own latent: A new approach to self-supervised Learning
tZh: 自举你的潜在表示：一种新的自监督学习方法
sEn: BYOL achieves state-of-the-art self-supervised learning without negative pairs.
sZh: BYOL 无需负样本对，实现了自监督学习的新高度。
absEn: We introduce Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL), a new approach to self-supervised image representation learning. BYOL relies on two neural networks, referred to as online and target networks, that interact and learn from each other. From an augmented view of an image, we train the online network to predict the target network representation of the same image under a different augmented view. At the same time, we update the target network with a slow-moving average of the online network. While state-of-the art methods rely on negative pairs, BYOL achieves a new state of the art without them. BYOL reaches $74.3\%$ top-1 classification accuracy on ImageNet using a linear evaluation with a ResNet-50 architecture and $79.6\%$ with a larger ResNet. We show that BYOL performs on par or better than the current state of the art on both transfer and semi-supervised benchmarks. Our implementation and pretrained models are given on GitHub.
absZh: 我们提出了自举你的潜在表示（BYOL），一种新的自监督图像表示学习方法。BYOL 依赖于两个神经网络，分别称为在线网络和目标网络，它们相互交互和学习。从一张图像的一个增强视图出发，我们训练在线网络预测同一图像在另一个不同增强视图下的目标网络表示。同时，我们使用在线网络的慢速移动平均来更新目标网络。虽然最先进的方法依赖于负样本对，但 BYOL 在没有它们的情况下达到了新的最先进水平。BYOL 在使用 ResNet-50 架构进行线性评估时，在 ImageNet 上达到了 74.3% 的 top-1 分类准确率，使用更大的 ResNet 时达到 79.6%。我们展示了 BYOL 在迁移学习和半监督基准测试上表现与当前最先进水平相当或更好。我们的实现和预训练模型已在 GitHub 上提供。

contrib.en: Introduces BYOL, a self-supervised learning method achieving state-of-the-art ImageNet linear evaluation without negative pairs.
contrib.zh: 提出BYOL，一种无需负样本对即可在ImageNet线性评估中达到最先进水平的自监督学习方法。

contrib.en: Demonstrates BYOL outperforms prior art on semi-supervised and transfer benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 证明BYOL在半监督和迁移基准上优于先前方法。

contrib.en: Shows BYOL is more robust to batch size and augmentation changes than contrastive methods.
contrib.zh: 展示BYOL对批次大小和数据增强变化的鲁棒性优于对比方法。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical hypothesis on why BYOL avoids collapse via predictor and slow-moving target network.
contrib.zh: 提供理论假设，解释BYOL如何通过预测器和慢速移动目标网络避免坍塌。

contrib.en: Achieves 79.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with a larger ResNet, narrowing gap to supervised learning.
contrib.zh: 使用更大ResNet在ImageNet上达到79.6% top-1准确率，缩小与监督学习的差距。

contrib.en: Releases implementation and pretrained models on GitHub for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 在GitHub上发布实现和预训练模型以促进可重复性。

limits.en: BYOL still relies on handcrafted image augmentations specific to vision, limiting generalization to other modalities.
limits.zh: BYOL仍依赖针对视觉的手工数据增强，限制了向其他模态的泛化。

limits.en: The method requires careful tuning of target decay rate and predictor architecture to avoid collapse.
limits.zh: 该方法需要仔细调整目标衰减率和预测器架构以避免坍塌。

limits.en: Performance depends on large batch sizes and compute resources (e.g., 512 TPU v3 cores).
limits.zh: 性能依赖于大批次和计算资源（如512个TPU v3核心）。

limits.en: Theoretical understanding of collapse avoidance is incomplete; only empirical evidence is provided.
limits.zh: 对避免坍塌的理论理解尚不完整，仅提供经验证据。

limits.en: BYOL may replicate biases present in training datasets, raising dual-use concerns.
limits.zh: BYOL可能复制训练数据中的偏见，引发双重用途问题。

items.en: We introduce Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL), a new approach to self-supervised image representation learning. BYOL relies on two neural networks, referred to as online and target networks, that interact and learn from each other. From an augmented view of an image, we train the online network to predict the target network representation of the same image under a different augmented view. At the same time, we update the target network with a slow-moving average of the online network. While state-of-the art methods rely on negative pairs, BYOL achieves a new state of the art without them. BYOL reaches 74.3%percent74.374.3\% top-1 classification accuracy on ImageNet using a linear evaluation with a ResNet-50 architecture and 79.6%percent79.679.6\% with a larger ResNet. We show that BYOL performs on par or better than the current state of the art on both transfer and semi-supervised benchmarks. Our implementation and pretrained models are given on GitHub.333https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/byol
items.zh: 我们提出 Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL)，一种新的自监督图像表示学习方法。BYOL 依赖于两个神经网络，称为在线网络和目标网络，它们相互作用并相互学习。从一张图像的增强视图出发，我们训练在线网络预测同一图像在另一种增强视图下的目标网络表示。同时，我们使用在线网络的慢速移动平均来更新目标网络。虽然最先进的方法依赖于负样本对，但 BYOL 在没有负样本对的情况下达到了新的最先进水平。BYOL 在使用 ResNet-50 架构的线性评估下，在 ImageNet 上达到 74.3% 的 top-1 分类准确率，使用更大的 ResNet 达到 79.6%。我们展示了 BYOL 在迁移和半监督基准测试上的表现与当前最先进方法相当或更好。我们的实现和预训练模型已在 GitHub 上提供。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Performance of BYOL on ImageNet (linear evaluation) using ResNet-50 and our best architecture ResNet-200 (2×2\times), compared to other unsupervised and supervised (Sup​.​) baselines [8].
items.capZh: 图 1：BYOL 在 ImageNet 上的性能（线性评估），使用 ResNet-50 和我们的最佳架构 ResNet-200（2×），与其他无监督和监督基线 [8] 的比较。

items.en: Learning good image representations is a key challenge in computer vision [1, 2, 3] as it allows for efficient training on downstream tasks [4, 5, 6, 7]. Many different training approaches have been proposed to learn such representations, usually relying on visual pretext tasks. Among them, state-of-the-art contrastive methods [8, 9, 10, 11, 12] are trained by reducing the distance between representations of different augmented views of the same image (‘positive pairs’), and increasing the distance between representations of augmented views from different images (‘negative pairs’). These methods need careful treatment of negative pairs [13] by either relying on large batch sizes [8, 12], memory banks [9] or customized mining strategies [14, 15] to retrieve the negative pairs. In addition, their performance critically depends on the choice of image augmentations [8, 12].
items.zh: 学习良好的图像表示是计算机视觉中的一个关键挑战 [1, 2, 3]，因为它允许在下游任务上进行高效训练 [4, 5, 6, 7]。许多不同的训练方法已被提出用于学习这样的表示，通常依赖于视觉预文本任务。其中，最先进的对比方法 [8, 9, 10, 11, 12] 通过减小同一图像不同增强视图的表示之间的距离（“正样本对”），并增大不同图像增强视图的表示之间的距离（“负样本对”）来训练。这些方法需要仔细处理负样本对 [13]，要么依赖大批量大小 [8, 12]、记忆库 [9] 或定制的挖掘策略 [14, 15] 来检索负样本对。此外，它们的性能关键取决于图像增强的选择 [8, 12]。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL), a new algorithm for self-supervised learning of image representations. BYOL achieves higher performance than state-of-the-art contrastive methods without using negative pairs. It iteratively bootstraps444Throughout this paper, the term bootstrap is used in its idiomatic sense rather than the statistical sense. the outputs of a network to serve as targets for an enhanced representation. Moreover, BYOL is more robust to the choice of image augmentations than contrastive methods; we suspect that not relying on negative pairs is one of the leading reasons for its improved robustness. While previous methods based on bootstrapping have used pseudo-labels [16], cluster indices [17] or a handful of labels [18, 19, 20], we propose to directly bootstrap the representations. In particular, BYOL uses two neural networks, referred to as online and target networks, that interact and learn from each other. Starting from an augmented view of an image, BYOL trains its online network to predict the target network’s representation of another augmented view of the same image. While this objective admits collapsed solutions, e.g., outputting the same vector for all images, we empirically show that BYOL does not converge to such solutions. We hypothesize (see Section 3.2) that the combination of (i) the addition of a predictor to the online network and (ii) the use of a slow-moving average of the online parameters as the target network encourages encoding more and more information within the online projection and avoids collapsed solutions.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出 Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL)，一种新的自监督学习图像表示算法。BYOL 在不使用负样本对的情况下实现了比最先进对比方法更高的性能。它迭代地引导网络输出作为增强表示的目标。此外，BYOL 对图像增强的选择比对比方法更鲁棒；我们推测不依赖负样本对是其改进鲁棒性的主要原因之一。虽然先前基于引导的方法使用了伪标签 [16]、聚类索引 [17] 或少量标签 [18, 19, 20]，但我们提出直接引导表示。特别地，BYOL 使用两个神经网络，称为在线网络和目标网络，它们相互作用并相互学习。从一张图像的增强视图开始，BYOL 训练其在线网络预测同一图像另一种增强视图的目标网络表示。虽然这个目标允许坍缩解，例如对所有图像输出相同的向量，但我们经验性地表明 BYOL 不会收敛到这样的解。我们假设（见第 3.2 节）(i) 在在线网络中添加预测器和 (ii) 使用在线参数的慢速移动平均作为目标网络的组合，鼓励在在线投影中编码更多信息并避免坍缩解。

items.en: We evaluate the representation learned by BYOL on ImageNet [21] and other vision benchmarks using ResNet architectures [22]. Under the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet, consisting in training a linear classifier on top of the frozen representation, BYOL reaches 74.3%percent74.374.3\% top-1 accuracy with a standard ResNet-505050 and 79.6%percent79.679.6\% top-1 accuracy with a larger ResNet (Figure 1). In the semi-supervised and transfer settings on ImageNet, we obtain results on par or superior to the current state of the art. Our contributions are: (i) We introduce BYOL, a self-supervised representation learning method (Section 3) which achieves state-of-the-art results under the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet without using negative pairs. (ii) We show that our learned representation outperforms the state of the art on semi-supervised and transfer benchmarks (Section 4). (iii) We show that BYOL is more resilient to changes in the batch size and in the set of image augmentations compared to its contrastive counterparts (Section 5). In particular, BYOL suffers a much smaller performance drop than SimCLR, a strong contrastive baseline, when only using random crops as image augmentations.
items.zh: 我们使用 ResNet 架构 [22] 在 ImageNet [21] 和其他视觉基准上评估 BYOL 学习到的表示。在 ImageNet 的线性评估协议下，即在冻结表示之上训练线性分类器，BYOL 使用标准 ResNet-50 达到 74.3% 的 top-1 准确率，使用更大的 ResNet 达到 79.6% 的 top-1 准确率（图 1）。在 ImageNet 的半监督和迁移设置中，我们获得了与当前最先进方法相当或更好的结果。我们的贡献是：(i) 我们引入 BYOL，一种自监督表示学习方法（第 3 节），在 ImageNet 的线性评估协议下，不使用负样本对就达到了最先进的结果。(ii) 我们展示了学习到的表示在半监督和迁移基准上优于最先进方法（第 4 节）。(iii) 我们展示了 BYOL 在批量大小和图像增强集的变化方面比其对比对应方法更具弹性（第 5 节）。特别地，当仅使用随机裁剪作为图像增强时，BYOL 的性能下降远小于强对比基线 SimCLR。

items.en: Most unsupervised methods for representation learning can be categorized as either generative or discriminative [23, 8]. Generative approaches to representation learning build a distribution over data and latent embedding and use the learned embeddings as image representations. Many of these approaches rely either on auto-encoding of images [24, 25, 26] or on adversarial learning [27], jointly modelling data and representation [28, 29, 30, 31]. Generative methods typically operate directly in pixel space. This however is computationally expensive, and the high level of detail required for image generation may not be necessary for representation learning.
items.zh: 大多数无监督表示学习方法可以分为生成式或判别式 [23, 8]。生成式表示学习方法构建数据和潜在嵌入的分布，并使用学习到的嵌入作为图像表示。许多这些方法依赖于图像的自动编码 [24, 25, 26] 或对抗学习 [27]，联合建模数据和表示 [28, 29, 30, 31]。生成式方法通常直接在像素空间中操作。然而，这在计算上很昂贵，并且图像生成所需的高水平细节对于表示学习可能不是必需的。

items.en: Among discriminative methods, contrastive methods [9, 10, 32, 33, 34, 11, 35, 36] currently achieve state-of-the-art performance in self-supervised learning [37, 8, 38, 12]. Contrastive approaches avoid a costly generation step in pixel space by bringing representation of different views of the same image closer (‘positive pairs’), and spreading representations of views from different images (‘negative pairs’) apart [39, 40]. Contrastive methods often require comparing each example with many other examples to work well [9, 8] prompting the question of whether using negative pairs is necessary.
items.zh: 在判别式方法中，对比方法 [9, 10, 32, 33, 34, 11, 35, 36] 目前在自监督学习中达到最先进性能 [37, 8, 38, 12]。对比方法通过将同一图像不同视图的表示拉近（“正样本对”），并将不同图像视图的表示推开（“负样本对”）[39, 40]，避免了像素空间中昂贵的生成步骤。对比方法通常需要将每个示例与许多其他示例进行比较才能工作良好 [9, 8]，这引发了是否必须使用负样本对的问题。

items.en: DeepCluster [17] partially answers this question. It uses bootstrapping on previous versions of its representation to produce targets for the next representation; it clusters data points using the prior representation, and uses the cluster index of each sample as a classification target for the new representation. While avoiding the use of negative pairs, this requires a costly clustering phase and specific precautions to avoid collapsing to trivial solutions.
items.zh: DeepCluster [17] 部分回答了这个问题。它使用先前版本表示的引导来为下一个表示生成目标；它使用先前的表示对数据点进行聚类，并将每个样本的聚类索引作为新表示的分类目标。虽然避免了使用负样本对，但这需要昂贵的聚类阶段和特定的预防措施以避免坍缩到平凡解。

items.en: Some self-supervised methods are not contrastive but rely on using auxiliary handcrafted prediction tasks to learn their representation. In particular, relative patch prediction [23, 40], colorizing gray-scale images [41, 42], image inpainting [43], image jigsaw puzzle [44], image super-resolution [45], and geometric transformations [46, 47] have been shown to be useful. Yet, even with suitable architectures [48], these methods are being outperformed by contrastive methods [37, 8, 12].
items.zh: 一些自监督方法不是对比的，而是依赖于使用辅助手工预测任务来学习其表示。特别地，相对补丁预测 [23, 40]、灰度图像着色 [41, 42]、图像修复 [43]、图像拼图 [44]、图像超分辨率 [45] 和几何变换 [46, 47] 已被证明是有用的。然而，即使使用合适的架构 [48]，这些方法也被对比方法 [37, 8, 12] 超越。

items.en: Our approach has some similarities with Predictions of Bootstrapped Latents (PBL, [49]), a self-supervised representation learning technique for reinforcement learning (RL). PBL jointly trains the agent’s history representation and an encoding of future observations. The observation encoding is used as a target to train the agent’s representation, and the agent’s representation as a target to train the observation encoding. Unlike PBL, BYOL uses a slow-moving average of its representation to provide its targets, and does not require a second network.
items.zh: 我们的方法与引导潜在预测 (PBL, [49]) 有一些相似之处，这是一种用于强化学习 (RL) 的自监督表示学习技术。PBL 联合训练智能体的历史表示和未来观测的编码。观测编码被用作训练智能体表示的目标，而智能体表示被用作训练观测编码的目标。与 PBL 不同，BYOL 使用其表示的慢速移动平均来提供目标，并且不需要第二个网络。

items.en: The idea of using a slow-moving average target network to produce stable targets for the online network was inspired by deep RL [50, 51, 52, 53]. Target networks stabilize the bootstrapping updates provided by the Bellman equation, making them appealing to stabilize the bootstrap mechanism in BYOL. While most RL methods use fixed target networks, BYOL uses a weighted moving average of previous networks (as in [54]) in order to provide smoother changes in the target representation.
items.zh: 使用慢速移动平均目标网络为在线网络产生稳定目标的想法受到深度 RL [50, 51, 52, 53] 的启发。目标网络稳定了贝尔曼方程提供的引导更新，使其对稳定 BYOL 中的引导机制具有吸引力。虽然大多数 RL 方法使用固定的目标网络，但 BYOL 使用先前网络的加权移动平均（如 [54] 中）以提供目标表示的更平滑变化。

items.en: In the semi-supervised setting [55, 56], an unsupervised loss is combined with a classification loss over a handful of labels to ground the training [19, 20, 57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 62]. Among these methods, mean teacher (MT) [20] also uses a slow-moving average network, called teacher, to produce targets for an online network, called student. An ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} consistency loss between the softmax predictions of the teacher and the student is added to the classification loss. While [20] demonstrates the effectiveness of MT in the semi-supervised learning case, in Section 5 we show that a similar approach collapses when removing the classification loss. In contrast, BYOL introduces an additional predictor on top of the online network, which prevents collapse.
items.zh: 在半监督设置 [55, 56] 中，无监督损失与少量标签上的分类损失相结合以锚定训练 [19, 20, 57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 62]。在这些方法中，均值教师 (MT) [20] 也使用一个慢速移动平均网络，称为教师，为在线网络（称为学生）产生目标。在教师和学生的 softmax 预测之间添加 ℓ2 一致性损失到分类损失中。虽然 [20] 证明了 MT 在半监督学习情况下的有效性，但在第 5 节中我们表明，当移除分类损失时，类似的方法会坍缩。相比之下，BYOL 在在线网络之上引入了一个额外的预测器，这防止了坍缩。

items.en: Finally, in self-supervised learning, MoCo [9] uses a slow-moving average network (momentum encoder) to maintain consistent representations of negative pairs drawn from a memory bank. Instead, BYOL uses a moving average network to produce prediction targets as a means of stabilizing the bootstrap step. We show in Section 5 that this mere stabilizing effect can also improve existing contrastive methods.
items.zh: 最后，在自监督学习中，MoCo [9] 使用一个慢速移动平均网络（动量编码器）来维护从记忆库中抽取的负样本对的一致表示。相反，BYOL 使用移动平均网络来产生预测目标，作为稳定引导步骤的手段。我们在第 5 节中表明，这种单纯的稳定效果也可以改进现有的对比方法。

items.en: We start by motivating our method before explaining its details in Section 3.1. Many successful self-supervised learning approaches build upon the cross-view prediction framework introduced in [63]. Typically, these approaches learn representations by predicting different views (e.g., different random crops) of the same image from one another. Many such approaches cast the prediction problem directly in representation space: the representation of an augmented view of an image should be predictive of the representation of another augmented view of the same image. However, predicting directly in representation space can lead to collapsed representations: for instance, a representation that is constant across views is always fully predictive of itself. Contrastive methods circumvent this problem by reformulating the prediction problem into one of discrimination: from the representation of an augmented view, they learn to discriminate between the representation of another augmented view of the same image, and the representations of augmented views of different images. In the vast majority of cases, this prevents the training from finding collapsed representations. Yet, this discriminative approach typically requires comparing each representation of an augmented view with many negative examples, to find ones sufficiently close to make the discrimination task challenging. In this work, we thus tasked ourselves to find out whether these negative examples are indispensable to prevent collapsing while preserving high performance.
items.zh: 我们首先在 3.1 节中解释方法细节之前，先说明其动机。许多成功的自监督学习方法建立在 [63] 中引入的跨视图预测框架之上。通常，这些方法通过预测同一图像的不同视图（例如，不同的随机裁剪）来学习表示。许多这样的方法直接在表示空间中构建预测问题：一张图像增强视图的表示应该能够预测同一图像另一增强视图的表示。然而，直接在表示空间中预测可能导致坍缩表示：例如，跨视图恒定的表示总是完全可预测自身。对比方法通过将预测问题重新表述为判别问题来规避这个问题：从增强视图的表示出发，它们学习区分同一图像另一增强视图的表示与不同图像增强视图的表示。在绝大多数情况下，这防止了训练找到坍缩表示。然而，这种判别方法通常需要将每个增强视图的表示与许多负样本进行比较，以找到足够接近的样本使判别任务具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们因此致力于找出这些负样本是否在防止坍缩的同时保持高性能方面不可或缺。

items.en: To prevent collapse, a straightforward solution is to use a fixed randomly initialized network to produce the targets for our predictions. While avoiding collapse, it empirically does not result in very good representations. Nonetheless, it is interesting to note that the representation obtained using this procedure can already be much better than the initial fixed representation. In our ablation study (Section 5), we apply this procedure by predicting a fixed randomly initialized network and achieve 18.8%percent18.818.8\% top-1 accuracy (Table 5(a)) on the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet, whereas the randomly initialized network only achieves 1.4%percent1.41.4\% by itself. This experimental finding is the core motivation for BYOL: from a given representation, referred to as target, we can train a new, potentially enhanced representation, referred to as online, by predicting the target representation. From there, we can expect to build a sequence of representations of increasing quality by iterating this procedure, using subsequent online networks as new target networks for further training. In practice, BYOL generalizes this bootstrapping procedure by iteratively refining its representation, but using a slowly moving exponential average of the online network as the target network instead of fixed checkpoints.
items.zh: 为了防止坍缩，一个直接的解决方案是使用固定的随机初始化网络来产生预测的目标。虽然避免了坍缩，但经验上这不会产生非常好的表示。尽管如此，有趣的是，使用此过程获得的表示已经可以比初始固定表示好得多。在我们的消融研究（第 5 节）中，我们通过预测一个固定的随机初始化网络应用此过程，在 ImageNet 的线性评估协议上达到 18.8% 的 top-1 准确率（表 5(a)），而随机初始化网络本身仅达到 1.4%。这个实验发现是 BYOL 的核心动机：从给定的表示（称为目标）出发，我们可以通过预测目标表示来训练一个新的、可能增强的表示（称为在线）。从那里，我们可以期望通过迭代此过程构建一系列质量不断提高的表示，使用后续的在线网络作为进一步训练的新目标网络。在实践中，BYOL 通过迭代地精炼其表示来推广这种引导过程，但使用在线网络的慢速指数移动平均作为目标网络，而不是固定的检查点。

items.en: BYOL’s goal is to learn a representation yθsubscript𝑦𝜃y_{\theta} which can then be used for downstream tasks. As described previously, BYOL uses two neural networks to learn: the online and target networks. The online network is defined by a set of weights θ𝜃{\theta} and is comprised of three stages: an encoder fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta}, a projector gθsubscript𝑔𝜃g_{\theta} and a predictor qθsubscript𝑞𝜃q_{\theta}, as shown in Figure 2 and Figure 8. The target network has the same architecture as the online network, but uses a different set of weights ξ𝜉\xi. The target network provides the regression targets to train the online network, and its parameters ξ𝜉\xi are an exponential moving average of the online parameters θ𝜃{\theta} [54]. items.en: As BYOL does not use an explicit term to prevent collapse (such as negative examples [10]) while minimizing ℒθ,ξBYOLsuperscriptsubscriptℒ𝜃𝜉BYOL\mathcal{L}_{{\theta},\xi}^{\texttt{BYOL}} with respect to θ𝜃{\theta}, it may seem that BYOL should converge to a minimum of this loss with respect to (θ,ξ)𝜃𝜉({\theta},\xi) (e.g., a collapsed constant representation). However BYOL’s target parameters ξ𝜉\xi updates are not in the direction of ∇ξℒθ,ξBYOLsubscript∇𝜉superscriptsubscriptℒ𝜃𝜉BYOL\nabla_{\xi}\mathcal{L}_{{\theta},\xi}^{\texttt{BYOL}}. More generally, we hypothesize that there is no loss Lθ,ξsubscript𝐿𝜃𝜉L_{{\theta},\xi} such that BYOL’s dynamics is a gradient descent on L𝐿L jointly over θ,ξ𝜃𝜉{\theta},\xi. This is similar to GANs [66], where there is no loss that is jointly minimized w.r.t. both the discriminator and generator parameters. There is therefore no a priori reason why BYOL’s parameters would converge to a minimum of ℒθ,ξBYOLsubscriptsuperscriptℒBYOL𝜃𝜉\mathcal{L}^{\texttt{BYOL}}_{{\theta},\xi}.
items.zh: 由于BYOL在相对于θ最小化Lθ,ξ^BYOL时没有使用显式的防止坍塌项（如负样本[10]），因此似乎BYOL应该收敛到该损失相对于(θ,ξ)的最小值（例如，坍塌的恒定表示）。然而，BYOL的目标参数ξ的更新并不沿着∇ξLθ,ξ^BYOL的方向。更一般地，我们假设不存在损失Lθ,ξ使得BYOL的动力学是L在θ,ξ上的联合梯度下降。这类似于GAN[66]，其中没有同时相对于判别器和生成器参数最小化的损失。因此，没有先验理由认为BYOL的参数会收敛到Lθ,ξ^BYOL的最小值。

items.en: Note that for any random variables X,𝑋X, Y,𝑌Y, and Z𝑍Z, Var(X|Y,Z)≤Var(X|Y)Varconditional𝑋𝑌𝑍Varconditional𝑋𝑌\operatorname*{Var}(X|Y,Z)\leq\operatorname*{Var}(X|Y). Let X𝑋X be the target projection, Y𝑌Y the current online projection, and Z𝑍Z an additional variability on top of the online projection induced by stochasticities in the training dynamics: purely discarding information from the online projection cannot decrease the conditional variance.
items.zh: 注意，对于任意随机变量X, Y和Z，Var(X|Y,Z) ≤ Var(X|Y)。设X为目标投影，Y为当前在线投影，Z为由训练动态中的随机性引起的在线投影之上的额外变异性：纯粹丢弃来自在线投影的信息不能降低条件方差。

items.en: In particular, BYOL avoids constant features in zθsubscript𝑧𝜃z_{\theta} as, for any constant c𝑐c and random variables zθsubscript𝑧𝜃z_{\theta} and zξ′subscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉z^{\prime}_{\xi}, Var(zξ′|zθ)≤Var(zξ′|c)Varconditionalsubscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉subscript𝑧𝜃Varconditionalsubscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉𝑐\operatorname*{Var}(z^{\prime}_{\xi}|z_{\theta})\leq\operatorname*{Var}(z^{\prime}_{\xi}|c); hence our hypothesis on these collapsed constant equilibria being unstable. Interestingly, if we were to minimize 𝔼​[∑iVar(zξ,i′|zθ)]𝔼delimited-[]subscript𝑖Varconditionalsubscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉𝑖subscript𝑧𝜃\mathbb{E}[\sum_{i}\operatorname*{Var}(z^{\prime}_{\xi,i}|z_{\theta})] with respect to ξ𝜉\xi, we would get a collapsed zξ′subscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉z^{\prime}_{\xi} as the variance is minimized for a constant zξ′subscriptsuperscript𝑧′𝜉z^{\prime}_{\xi}. Instead, BYOL makes ξ𝜉\xi closer to θ𝜃{\theta}, incorporating sources of variability captured by the online projection into the target projection.
items.zh: 特别地，BYOL避免了zθ中的恒定特征，因为对于任何常数c和随机变量zθ和z'ξ，Var(z'ξ|zθ) ≤ Var(z'ξ|c)；因此我们假设这些坍塌的恒定平衡点是不稳定的。有趣的是，如果我们相对于ξ最小化E[∑i Var(z'ξ,i|zθ)]，我们会得到坍塌的z'ξ，因为方差在常数z'ξ时最小。相反，BYOL使ξ更接近θ，将在线投影捕获的变异性来源纳入目标投影。

items.en: Furthemore, notice that performing a hard-copy of the online parameters θ𝜃{\theta} into the target parameters ξ𝜉\xi would be enough to propagate new sources of variability. However, sudden changes in the target network might break the assumption of an optimal predictor, in which case BYOL’s loss is not guaranteed to be close to the conditional variance. We hypothesize that the main role of BYOL’s moving-averaged target network is to ensure the near-optimality of the predictor over training; Section 5 and Appendix I provide some empirical support of this interpretation.
items.zh: 此外，注意将在线参数θ硬拷贝到目标参数ξ就足以传播新的变异性来源。然而，目标网络的突然变化可能会破坏最优预测器的假设，在这种情况下，BYOL的损失不能保证接近条件方差。我们假设BYOL的移动平均目标网络的主要作用是确保训练过程中预测器的接近最优性；第5节和附录I提供了这一解释的一些经验支持。

items.en: BYOL uses the same set of image augmentations as in SimCLR [8]. First, a random patch of the image is selected and resized to 224×224224224224\times 224 with a random horizontal flip, followed by a color distortion, consisting of a random sequence of brightness, contrast, saturation, hue adjustments, and an optional grayscale conversion. Finally Gaussian blur and solarization are applied to the patches. Additional details on the image augmentations are in Appendix B.
items.zh: BYOL使用与SimCLR[8]相同的图像增强集。首先，随机选择图像的一个补丁，并调整大小为224×224，随机水平翻转，然后进行颜色失真，包括随机序列的亮度、对比度、饱和度、色调调整，以及可选的灰度转换。最后对补丁应用高斯模糊和太阳化。图像增强的更多细节见附录B。

items.en: We use a convolutional residual network [22] with 50 layers and post-activation (ResNet-50(1×)50(1\times) v1) as our base parametric encoders fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} and fξsubscript𝑓𝜉f_{\xi}. We also use deeper (505050, 101101101, 152152152 and 200200200 layers) and wider (from 1×1\times to 4×4\times) ResNets, as in [67, 48, 8]. Specifically, the representation y𝑦y corresponds to the output of the final average pooling layer, which has a feature dimension of 204820482048 (for a width multiplier of 1×1\times). As in SimCLR [8], the representation y𝑦y is projected to a smaller space by a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) gθsubscript𝑔𝜃g_{\theta}, and similarly for the target projection gξsubscript𝑔𝜉g_{\xi}. This MLP consists in a linear layer with output size 409640964096 followed by batch normalization [68], rectified linear units (ReLU) [69], and a final linear layer with output dimension 256256256. Contrary to SimCLR, the output of this MLP is not batch normalized. The predictor qθsubscript𝑞𝜃q_{\theta} uses the same architecture as gθsubscript𝑔𝜃g_{\theta}.
items.zh: 我们使用具有50层和后激活的卷积残差网络[22]（ResNet-50(1×) v1）作为我们的基本参数化编码器fθ和fξ。我们还使用了更深（50、101、152和200层）和更宽（从1×到4×）的ResNet，如[67,48,8]所述。具体来说，表示y对应于最终平均池化层的输出，其特征维度为2048（对于宽度乘数为1×）。与SimCLR[8]类似，表示y通过多层感知机（MLP）gθ投影到更小的空间，目标投影gξ也是如此。该MLP由一个输出大小为4096的线性层，后接批归一化[68]、修正线性单元（ReLU）[69]和一个输出维度为256的最终线性层组成。与SimCLR相反，该MLP的输出没有进行批归一化。预测器qθ使用与gθ相同的架构。

items.en: We use the LARS optimizer [70] with a cosine decay learning rate schedule [71], without restarts, over 100010001000 epochs, with a warm-up period of 101010 epochs. We set the base learning rate to 0.2,0.20.2, scaled linearly [72] with the batch size (LearningRate=0.2×BatchSize/256LearningRate0.2BatchSize256\text{LearningRate}=0.2\times\text{BatchSize}/256). In addition, we use a global weight decay parameter of 1.5⋅10−6⋅1.5superscript1061.5\cdot 10^{-6} while excluding the biases and batch normalization parameters from both LARS adaptation and weight decay. For the target network, the exponential moving average parameter τ𝜏\tau starts from τbase=0.996subscript𝜏base0.996\tau_{\text{base}}=0.996 and is increased to one during training. Specifically, we set τ≜1−(1−τbase)⋅(cos⁡(π​k/K)+1)/2≜𝜏1⋅1subscript𝜏base𝜋𝑘𝐾12\tau\triangleq 1-(1-\tau_{\text{base}})\cdot\mathopen{}\mathclose{{}\left(\cos\mathopen{}\mathclose{{}\left(\pi k/K}\right)+1}\right)/2 with k𝑘k the current training step and K𝐾K the maximum number of training steps. We use a batch size of 409640964096 split over 512512512 Cloud TPU v333 cores. With this setup, training takes approximately 888 hours for a ResNet-50(×1)50(\times 1). All hyperparameters are summarized in Appendix J; an additional set of hyperparameters for a smaller batch size of 512512512 is provided in Appendix G.
items.zh: 我们使用LARS优化器[70]和余弦衰减学习率调度[71]，无重启，训练1000个epoch，预热期为10个epoch。我们将基础学习率设置为0.2，并随批量大小线性缩放[72]（LearningRate = 0.2 × BatchSize / 256）。此外，我们使用全局权重衰减参数1.5·10^{-6}，同时排除偏置和批归一化参数，使其不受LARS适应和权重衰减的影响。对于目标网络，指数移动平均参数τ从τbase=0.996开始，并在训练过程中增加到1。具体地，我们设置τ ≜ 1 - (1 - τbase) · (cos(πk/K) + 1) / 2，其中k是当前训练步，K是最大训练步数。我们使用批量大小4096，分布在512个Cloud TPU v3核心上。使用此设置，ResNet-50(×1)的训练大约需要8小时。所有超参数总结在附录J中；附录G提供了批量大小为512的额外超参数集。

items.en: We assess the performance of BYOL’s representation after self-supervised pretraining on the training set of the ImageNet ILSVRC-2012 dataset [21]. We first evaluate it on ImageNet (IN) in both linear evaluation and semi-supervised setups. We then measure its transfer capabilities on other datasets and tasks, including classification, segmentation, object detection and depth estimation. For comparison, we also report scores for a representation trained using labels from the train ImageNet subset, referred to as Supervised-IN. In Appendix E, we assess the generality of BYOL by pretraining a representation on the Places365-Standard dataset [73] before reproducing this evaluation protocol.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet ILSVRC-2012数据集[21]的训练集上进行自监督预训练后，评估BYOL表示的性能。我们首先在ImageNet（IN）上在线性评估和半监督设置下进行评估。然后，我们测量其在其他数据集和任务上的迁移能力，包括分类、分割、目标检测和深度估计。为了比较，我们还报告了使用ImageNet训练子集标签训练的表示（称为Supervised-IN）的分数。在附录E中，我们通过在Places365-Standard数据集[73]上预训练表示，然后重复此评估协议，来评估BYOL的通用性。

items.en: We first evaluate BYOL’s representation by training a linear classifier on top of the frozen representation, following the procedure described in [48, 74, 41, 10, 8], and section C.1; we report top-111 and top-555 accuracies in % on the test set in Table 1. With a standard ResNet-505050 (×1absent1\times 1) BYOL obtains 74.3%percent74.374.3\% top-111 accuracy (91.6%percent91.691.6\% top-555 accuracy), which is a 1.3%percent1.31.3\% (resp. 0.5%percent0.50.5\%) improvement over the previous self-supervised state of the art [12]. This tightens the gap with respect to the supervised baseline of [8], 76.5%percent76.576.5\%, but is still significantly below the stronger supervised baseline of [75], 78.9%percent78.978.9\%. With deeper and wider architectures, BYOL consistently outperforms the previous state of the art (Section C.2), and obtains a best performance of 79.6%percent79.679.6\% top-111 accuracy, ranking higher than previous self-supervised approaches. On a ResNet-505050 (4×4\times) BYOL achieves 78.6%percent78.678.6\%, similar to the 78.9%percent78.978.9\% of the best supervised baseline in [8] for the same architecture.
items.zh: 我们首先通过在冻结表示之上训练线性分类器来评估BYOL的表示，遵循[48,74,41,10,8]和C.1节中描述的程序；我们在表1中报告了测试集上的top-1和top-5准确率（%）。使用标准ResNet-50（×1），BYOL获得了74.3%的top-1准确率（91.6%的top-5准确率），比之前的自监督最先进技术[12]提高了1.3%（分别为0.5%）。这缩小了与[8]的监督基线76.5%的差距，但仍显著低于[75]更强的监督基线78.9%。使用更深更宽的架构，BYOL持续优于之前的最先进技术（C.2节），并获得了79.6%的top-1准确率的最佳性能，高于之前的自监督方法。在ResNet-50（4×）上，BYOL达到了78.6%，与[8]中相同架构的最佳监督基线78.9%相似。

items.en: Next, we evaluate the performance obtained when fine-tuning BYOL’s representation on a classification task with a small subset of ImageNet’s train set, this time using label information. We follow the semi-supervised protocol of [74, 76, 8, 32] detailed in Section C.1, and use the same fixed splits of respectively 1%percent11\% and 10%percent1010\% of ImageNet labeled training data as in [8]. We report both top-111 and top-555 accuracies on the test set in Table 2. BYOL consistently outperforms previous approaches across a wide range of architectures. Additionally, as detailed in Section C.1, BYOL reaches 77.7%percent77.777.7\% top-111 accuracy with ResNet-50 when fine-tuning over 100%percent100100\% of ImageNet labels.
items.zh: 接下来，我们评估在ImageNet训练集的小子集上微调BYOL表示用于分类任务时的性能，这次使用标签信息。我们遵循[74,76,8,32]的半监督协议，详见C.1节，并使用与[8]相同的固定分割，分别为ImageNet标记训练数据的1%和10%。我们在表2中报告了测试集上的top-1和top-5准确率。BYOL在多种架构上持续优于之前的方法。此外，如C.1节所述，当在100%的ImageNet标签上微调时，BYOL使用ResNet-50达到了77.7%的top-1准确率。

items.en: We evaluate our representation on other classification datasets to assess whether the features learned on ImageNet (IN) are generic and thus useful across image domains, or if they are ImageNet-specific. We perform linear evaluation and fine-tuning on the same set of classification tasks used in [8, 74], and carefully follow their evaluation protocol, as detailed in Appendix D. Performance is reported using standard metrics for each benchmark, and results are provided on a held-out test set after hyperparameter selection on a validation set. We report results in Table 3, both for linear evaluation and fine-tuning. BYOL outperforms SimCLR on all benchmarks and the Supervised-IN baseline on 777 of the 121212 benchmarks, providing only slightly worse performance on the 555 remaining benchmarks. BYOL’s representation can be transferred over to small images, e.g., CIFAR [78], landscapes, e.g., SUN397 [79] or VOC2007 [80], and textures, e.g., DTD [81].
items.zh: 我们在其他分类数据集上评估我们的表示，以评估在ImageNet（IN）上学习的特征是否通用，从而适用于不同图像领域，还是仅针对ImageNet。我们在[8,74]中使用的相同分类任务集上进行线性评估和微调，并仔细遵循其评估协议，详见附录D。使用每个基准的标准指标报告性能，并在验证集上进行超参数选择后，在保留的测试集上提供结果。我们在表3中报告了线性评估和微调的结果。BYOL在所有基准上优于SimCLR，并在12个基准中的7个上优于Supervised-IN基线，仅在其余5个基准上性能略差。BYOL的表示可以迁移到小图像（如CIFAR[78]）、风景（如SUN397[79]或VOC2007[80]）和纹理（如DTD[81]）。

items.en: We evaluate our representation on different tasks relevant to computer vision practitioners, namely semantic segmentation, object detection and depth estimation. With this evaluation, we assess whether BYOL’s representation generalizes beyond classification tasks.
items.zh: 我们在与计算机视觉从业者相关的不同任务上评估我们的表示，即语义分割、目标检测和深度估计。通过此评估，我们评估BYOL的表示是否泛化到分类任务之外。

items.en: We first evaluate BYOL on the VOC2012 semantic segmentation task as detailed in Section D.4, where the goal is to classify each pixel in the image [7]. We report the results in Table 4(a). BYOL outperforms both the Supervised-IN baseline (+1.91.9+1.9 mIoU) and SimCLR (+1.11.1+1.1 mIoU).
items.zh: 我们首先在VOC2012语义分割任务上评估BYOL，详见D.4节，目标是对图像中的每个像素进行分类[7]。我们在表4(a)中报告结果。BYOL优于Supervised-IN基线（+1.9 mIoU）和SimCLR（+1.1 mIoU）。

items.en: Similarly, we evaluate on object detection by reproducing the setup in [9] using a Faster R-CNN architecture [82], as detailed in Section D.5. We fine-tune on trainval2007 and report results on test2007 using the standard AP50 metric; BYOL is significantly better than the Supervised-IN baseline (+3.13.1+3.1 AP50) and SimCLR (+2.32.3+2.3 AP50).
items.zh: 类似地，我们通过重现[9]中的设置，使用Faster R-CNN架构[82]评估目标检测，详见D.5节。我们在trainval2007上微调，并在test2007上使用标准AP50指标报告结果；BYOL显著优于Supervised-IN基线（+3.1 AP50）和SimCLR（+2.3 AP50）。

items.en: Finally, we evaluate on depth estimation on the NYU v2 dataset, where the depth map of a scene is estimated given a single RGB image. Depth prediction measures how well a network represents geometry, and how well that information can be localized to pixel accuracy [40]. The setup is based on [83] and detailed in Section D.6. We evaluate on the commonly used test subset of 654654654 images and report results using several common metrics in Table 4(b): relative (rel) error, root mean squared (rms) error, and the percent of pixels (pct) where the error, max⁡(dg​t/dp,dp/dg​t)subscript𝑑𝑔𝑡subscript𝑑𝑝subscript𝑑𝑝subscript𝑑𝑔𝑡\max(d_{gt}/d_{p},d_{p}/d_{gt}), is below 1.25nsuperscript1.25𝑛1.25^{n} thresholds where dpsubscript𝑑𝑝d_{p} is the predicted depth and dg​tsubscript𝑑𝑔𝑡d_{gt} is the ground truth depth [40]. BYOL is better or on par with other methods for each metric. For instance, the challenging pct. <1.25absent1.25\!\,\!<\!\!1.25 measure is respectively improved by +3.53.5+3.5 points and +1.31.3+1.3 points compared to supervised and SimCLR baselines.
items.zh: 最后，我们在NYU v2数据集上评估深度估计，其中根据单个RGB图像估计场景的深度图。深度预测衡量网络表示几何的能力，以及该信息定位到像素精度的能力[40]。该设置基于[83]，详见D.6节。我们在常用的654张图像的测试子集上评估，并使用几个常见指标在表4(b)中报告结果：相对（rel）误差、均方根（rms）误差，以及误差max(d_gt/d_p, d_p/d_gt)低于1.25^n阈值的像素百分比（pct），其中d_p是预测深度，d_gt是真实深度[40]。BYOL在每个指标上优于或与其他方法相当。例如，具有挑战性的pct. <1.25度量分别比监督基线和SimCLR基线提高了+3.5点和+1.3点。

items.en: We present ablations on BYOL to give an intuition of its behavior and performance. For reproducibility, we run each configuration of parameters over three seeds, and report the average performance. We also report the half difference between the best and worst runs when it is larger than 0.250.250.25. Although previous works perform ablations at 100100100 epochs [8, 12], we notice that relative improvements at 100100100 epochs do not always hold over longer training. For this reason, we run ablations over 300300300 epochs on 646464 TPU v333 cores, which yields consistent results compared to our baseline training of 100010001000 epochs. For all the experiments in this section, we set the initial learning rate to 0.30.30.3 with batch size 409640964096, the weight decay to 10−6superscript10610^{-6} as in SimCLR [8] and the base target decay rate τbasesubscript𝜏base\tau_{\text{base}} to 0.990.990.99. In this section we report results in top-111 accuracy on ImageNet under the linear evaluation protocol as in Section C.1.
items.zh: 我们对BYOL进行消融研究，以直观了解其行为和性能。为了可重复性，我们在三个种子上运行每种参数配置，并报告平均性能。当最佳和最差运行之间的半差大于0.25时，我们也报告该值。尽管先前的工作在100个epoch时进行消融[8,12]，但我们注意到100个epoch时的相对改进并不总是适用于更长的训练。因此，我们在64个TPU v3核心上运行300个epoch的消融，这与我们1000个epoch的基线训练结果一致。对于本节中的所有实验，我们设置初始学习率为0.3，批量大小为4096，权重衰减为10^{-6}（如SimCLR[8]），基础目标衰减率τbase为0.99。在本节中，我们按照C.1节中的线性评估协议报告ImageNet上的top-1准确率。

items.en: Among contrastive methods, the ones that draw negative examples from the minibatch suffer performance drops when their batch size is reduced. BYOL does not use negative examples and we expect it to be more robust to smaller batch sizes. To empirically verify this hypothesis, we train both BYOL and SimCLR using different batch sizes from 128128128 to 409640964096. To avoid re-tuning other hyperparameters, we average gradients over N𝑁N consecutive steps before updating the online network when reducing the batch size by a factor N𝑁N. The target network is updated once every N𝑁N steps, after the update of the online network; we accumulate the N𝑁N-steps in parallel in our runs.
items.zh: 在对比方法中，那些从小批量中抽取负例的方法在批量大小减小时性能会下降。BYOL 不使用负例，我们预期它对较小的批量大小更稳健。为了实证验证这一假设，我们使用从 128 到 4096 的不同批量大小训练 BYOL 和 SimCLR。为了避免重新调整其他超参数，当批量大小减小 N 倍时，我们在更新在线网络之前对 N 个连续步骤的梯度进行平均。目标网络在在线网络更新后每 N 步更新一次；我们在运行中并行累积 N 步。

items.en: As shown in Figure 3(a), the performance of SimCLR rapidly deteriorates with batch size, likely due to the decrease in the number of negative examples. In contrast, the performance of BYOL remains stable over a wide range of batch sizes from 256256256 to 409640964096, and only drops for smaller values due to batch normalization layers in the encoder.777The only dependency on batch size in our training pipeline sits within the batch normalization layers.
items.zh: 如图 3(a) 所示，SimCLR 的性能随批量大小迅速恶化，这可能是由于负例数量的减少。相比之下，BYOL 的性能在 256 到 4096 的广泛批量大小范围内保持稳定，仅在较小值时由于编码器中的批归一化层而下降。7

items.en: Contrastive methods are sensitive to the choice of image augmentations. For instance, SimCLR does not work well when removing color distortion from its image augmentations. As an explanation, SimCLR shows that crops of the same image mostly share their color histograms. At the same time, color histograms vary across images. Therefore, when a contrastive task only relies on random crops as image augmentations, it can be mostly solved by focusing on color histograms alone. As a result the representation is not incentivized to retain information beyond color histograms. To prevent that, SimCLR adds color distortion to its set of image augmentations. Instead, BYOL is incentivized to keep any information captured by the target representation into its online network, to improve its predictions. Therefore, even if augmented views of a same image share the same color histogram, BYOL is still incentivized to retain additional features in its representation. For that reason, we believe that BYOL is more robust to the choice of image augmentations than contrastive methods.
items.zh: 对比方法对图像增强的选择很敏感。例如，SimCLR 在从其图像增强中移除颜色失真时效果不佳。作为一种解释，SimCLR 表明同一图像的裁剪块大多共享其颜色直方图。同时，不同图像的颜色直方图各不相同。因此，当对比任务仅依赖随机裁剪作为图像增强时，它可以通过仅关注颜色直方图来大部分解决。结果，表示没有动力保留颜色直方图之外的信息。为了防止这种情况，SimCLR 在其图像增强集中添加了颜色失真。相反，BYOL 有动力将目标表示捕获的任何信息保留到其在线网络中，以改进其预测。因此，即使同一图像的增强视图共享相同的颜色直方图，BYOL 仍然有动力在其表示中保留额外的特征。基于这个原因，我们相信 BYOL 对图像增强的选择比对比方法更稳健。

items.en: Results presented in Figure 3(b) support this hypothesis: the performance of BYOL is much less affected than the performance of SimCLR when removing color distortions from the set of image augmentations (−9.19.1-9.1 accuracy points for BYOL, −22.222.2-22.2 accuracy points for SimCLR). When image augmentations are reduced to mere random crops, BYOL still displays good performance (59.4%percent59.459.4\%, i.e. −13.113.1-13.1 points from 72.5%percent72.572.5\% ), while SimCLR loses more than a third of its performance (40.3%percent40.340.3\%, i.e. −27.627.6-27.6 points from 67.9%percent67.967.9\%). We report additional ablations in Section F.3.
items.zh: 图 3(b) 中呈现的结果支持这一假设：当从图像增强集中移除颜色失真时，BYOL 的性能受影响远小于 SimCLR（BYOL 下降 9.1 个准确率点，SimCLR 下降 22.2 个准确率点）。当图像增强减少为仅随机裁剪时，BYOL 仍然表现出良好的性能（59.4%，即从 72.5% 下降 13.1 个百分点），而 SimCLR 损失了超过三分之一的性能（40.3%，即从 67.9% 下降 27.6 个百分点）。我们在第 F.3 节中报告了额外的消融实验。

items.en: BYOL uses the projected representation of a target network, whose weights are an exponential moving average of the weights of the online network, as target for its predictions. This way, the weights of the target network represent a delayed and more stable version of the weights of the online network. When the target decay rate is 111, the target network is never updated, and remains at a constant value corresponding to its initialization. When the target decay rate is 00, the target network is instantaneously updated to the online network at each step. There is a trade-off between updating the targets too often and updating them too slowly, as illustrated in Table 5(a). Instantaneously updating the target network (τ=0𝜏0\tau=0) destabilizes training, yielding very poor performance while never updating the target (τ=1𝜏1\tau=1) makes the training stable but prevents iterative improvement, ending with low-quality final representation. All values of the decay rate between 0.90.90.9 and 0.9990.9990.999 yield performance above 68.4%percent68.468.4\% top-111 accuracy at 300300300 epochs.
items.zh: BYOL 使用目标网络的投影表示作为其预测的目标，目标网络的权重是在线网络权重的指数移动平均。这样，目标网络的权重代表在线网络权重的延迟且更稳定的版本。当目标衰减率为 1 时，目标网络从不更新，并保持与其初始化对应的常数值。当目标衰减率为 0 时，目标网络在每个步骤立即更新为在线网络。在更新目标过于频繁和更新过慢之间存在权衡，如表 5(a) 所示。立即更新目标网络（τ=0）会使训练不稳定，产生非常差的性能，而从不更新目标（τ=1）使训练稳定但阻止了迭代改进，最终得到低质量的表示。衰减率在 0.9 到 0.999 之间的所有值在 300 个 epoch 时都产生高于 68.4% 的 top-1 准确率。

items.en: In this subsection, we recast SimCLR and BYOL using the same formalism to better understand where the improvement of BYOL over SimCLR comes from. Let us consider the following objective that extends the InfoNCE objective [10, 84] (see Section F.4),
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们使用相同的形式重新表述 SimCLR 和 BYOL，以更好地理解 BYOL 相对于 SimCLR 的改进来源。让我们考虑以下扩展 InfoNCE 目标 [10, 84] 的目标（见第 F.4 节），

items.en: The only variant that performs well without negative examples (i.e., with β=0𝛽0\beta=0) is BYOL, using both a bootstrap target network and a predictor. Adding the negative pairs to BYOL’s loss without re-tuning the temperature parameter hurts its performance. In Section F.4, we show that we can add back negative pairs and still match the performance of BYOL with proper tuning of the temperature.
items.zh: 唯一在没有负例（即 β=0）的情况下表现良好的变体是 BYOL，它同时使用了引导目标网络和预测器。在不重新调整温度参数的情况下将负对添加到 BYOL 的损失中会损害其性能。在第 F.4 节中，我们表明可以通过适当调整温度重新添加负对并仍然匹配 BYOL 的性能。

items.en: Simply adding a target network to SimCLR already improves performance (+1.61.6+1.6 points). This sheds new light on the use of the target network in MoCo [9], where the target network is used to provide more negative examples. Here, we show that by mere stabilization effect, even when using the same number of negative examples, using a target network is beneficial. Finally, we observe that modifying the architecture of Sθsubscript𝑆𝜃S_{\theta} to include a predictor only mildly affects the performance of SimCLR.
items.zh: 仅向 SimCLR 添加目标网络就已经提高了性能（+1.6 个百分点）。这为 MoCo [9] 中目标网络的使用提供了新的视角，其中目标网络用于提供更多负例。在这里，我们表明，仅通过稳定效应，即使使用相同数量的负例，使用目标网络也是有益的。最后，我们观察到修改 Sθ 的架构以包含预测器仅轻微影响 SimCLR 的性能。

items.en: In Appendix F, we explore how other network parameters may impact BYOL’s performance. We iterate over multiple weight decays, learning rates, and projector/encoder architectures to observe that small hyperparameter changes do not drastically alter the final score. We note that removing the weight decay in either BYOL or SimCLR leads to network divergence, emphasizing the need for weight regularization in the self-supervised setting. Furthermore, we observe that changing the scaling factor in the network initialization [85] did not impact the performance (higher than 72%percent7272\% top-111 accuracy).
items.zh: 在附录 F 中，我们探讨了其他网络参数如何影响 BYOL 的性能。我们遍历了多个权重衰减、学习率和投影器/编码器架构，观察到小的超参数变化不会显著改变最终得分。我们注意到，在 BYOL 或 SimCLR 中移除权重衰减会导致网络发散，强调了在自监督设置中权重正则化的必要性。此外，我们观察到改变网络初始化中的缩放因子 [85] 不会影响性能（高于 72% 的 top-1 准确率）。

items.en: Another semi-supervised approach, Mean Teacher (MT) [20], complements a supervised loss on few labels with an additional consistency loss. In [20], this consistency loss is the ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} distance between the logits from a student network, and those of a temporally averaged version of the student network, called teacher. Removing the predictor in BYOL results in an unsupervised version of MT with no classification loss that uses image augmentations instead of the original architectural noise (e.g., dropout). This variant of BYOL collapses (Row 7 of Table 5) which suggests that the additional predictor is critical to prevent collapse in an unsupervised scenario.
items.zh: 另一种半监督方法，Mean Teacher (MT) [20]，用额外的一致性损失补充了少量标签上的监督损失。在 [20] 中，这个一致性损失是学生网络 logits 与其时间平均版本（称为教师）的 logits 之间的 ℓ2 距离。移除 BYOL 中的预测器会产生一个无监督版本的 MT，没有分类损失，使用图像增强代替原始架构噪声（例如 dropout）。这种 BYOL 变体会崩溃（表 5 的第 7 行），这表明额外的预测器对于防止无监督场景中的崩溃至关重要。

items.en: We introduced BYOL, a new algorithm for self-supervised learning of image representations. BYOL learns its representation by predicting previous versions of its outputs, without using negative pairs. We show that BYOL achieves state-of-the-art results on various benchmarks. In particular, under the linear evaluation protocol on ImageNet with a ResNet-505050 (1×1\times), BYOL achieves a new state of the art and bridges most of the remaining gap between self-supervised methods and the supervised learning baseline of [8]. Using a ResNet-200200200 (2×)(2\times), BYOL reaches a top-111 accuracy of 79.6%percent79.679.6\% which improves over the previous state of the art (76.8%percent76.876.8\%) while using 30%percent3030\% fewer parameters.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 BYOL，一种用于图像表示自监督学习的新算法。BYOL 通过预测其输出的先前版本来学习其表示，而不使用负对。我们表明 BYOL 在各种基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。特别是在 ImageNet 上使用 ResNet-50 (1×) 的线性评估协议下，BYOL 达到了新的最先进水平，并弥合了自监督方法与 [8] 的监督学习基线之间的大部分剩余差距。使用 ResNet-200 (2×)，BYOL 达到了 79.6% 的 top-1 准确率，比之前的最先进水平（76.8%）提高了，同时使用的参数减少了 30%。

items.en: Nevertheless, BYOL remains dependent on existing sets of augmentations that are specific to vision applications. To generalize BYOL to other modalities (e.g., audio, video, text, …) it is necessary to obtain similarly suitable augmentations for each of them. Designing such augmentations may require significant effort and expertise. Therefore, automating the search for these augmentations would be an important next step to generalize BYOL to other modalities.
items.zh: 尽管如此，BYOL 仍然依赖于视觉应用特定的现有增强集。为了将 BYOL 推广到其他模态（例如音频、视频、文本等），有必要为每种模态获得类似的合适增强。设计这样的增强可能需要大量的努力和专业知识。因此，自动化这些增强的搜索将是推广 BYOL 到其他模态的重要下一步。

items.en: The presented research should be categorized as research in the field of unsupervised learning. This work may inspire new algorithms, theoretical, and experimental investigation. The algorithm presented here can be used for many different vision applications and a particular use may have both positive or negative impacts, which is known as the dual use problem. Besides, as vision datasets could be biased, the representation learned by BYOL could be susceptible to replicate these biases.
items.zh: 所呈现的研究应归类为无监督学习领域的研究。这项工作可能会激发新的算法、理论和实验研究。这里提出的算法可以用于许多不同的视觉应用，特定用途可能既有积极影响也有消极影响，这被称为双重用途问题。此外，由于视觉数据集可能存在偏差，BYOL 学习的表示可能容易复制这些偏差。
